SCADA Standards Appendix A 
20.2Variable Speed Equipment
HFC AWTP Master Plan 
Howard F. Curren AWTP 
SCADA Standards Appendix A ­
Definitions and General Reference 
January 2025 
106
artifact_summary: Visual representation of variable speed pump states including running percentages, alarm statuses, and stopped conditions for High Serv. Pump No.1 and No.2.
artifact_blurb: A collection of graphical user interface elements from the Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A, specifically depicting variable speed pump controls. The gallery details distinct visual states for 'High Serv. Pump No.1' and 'No.2', featuring dynamic indicators for operational load percentages, active alarm conditions, and system stoppage events.
